plugins.name: Cross-Volume Write Fix (0.1.2)
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Fixes a Paralives 0.1.2 regression that breaks Workshop mod loading (and some save writes) when your Steam library is on a different drive than Windows %TEMP%. The devs' new atomic-write helper uses Path.GetTempFileName() (under %TEMP%) + File.Replace, which throws Win32 error 1176 (ERROR_UNABLE_TO_MOVE_REPLACEMENT) cross-volume. This patch routes the temp file to the same directory as the destination so File.Replace works. Install if you see 'IOException: Win32 IO returned 1176' in your BepInEx log, or if Workshop mods stopped loading after 0.1.2.

plugins.name: Plugin Hub
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Browse, install, and toggle Paralives mods from inside the game. Auto-updates itself and your installed mods on each launch — no manual file copying after the first install. Also fixes the Steam-offline boot hang so the game launches without internet. v1.0.13 fixes a per-frame FindObjectOfType call that caused 15fps for all users with the hub installed.

plugins.name: Not Enough Workshop Mods
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Fixes the Steam Workshop 50-mod cap. Without it, any subscribed mods past #50 get DELETED from your computer on game launch. Default safety cap is 15,000 mods — raise it in the cfg if you somehow have more. Also loads your downloaded Workshop mods when Steam is offline (vanilla would skip them). v1.0.5 rewrites all Steam API calls to use reflection so the full multi-page fetch works on Mac/Linux (no more offline-fallback-only on those platforms).

plugins.name: Stop Reimporting My Mods
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Fixes the 'Reimporting Assets' hang that can freeze the game indefinitely when a mod has a missing or corrupted asset. Also stops a single broken mod from aborting the entire boot sequence — other mods load fine and the bad one is skipped with a log message.

plugins.name: Menu FPS Limiter
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Stops your fans screaming while the menu sits at 200+ fps doing nothing. Caps menu to 60fps, drops to 10fps when alt-tabbed, 3fps when minimized. Gameplay runs uncapped. All thresholds configurable.

plugins.name: Stats Overlay
plugins.author: 6ix
plugins.description: Unity-Editor-style stats panel — FPS, CPU/render times, draw calls, triangles, audio level, animation counts. Top-left overlay. Press F3 to toggle.
